segment.source: Renders one flagship case study as a spotlight: eyebrow and heading, large hero image, client logo and name, detailed rich-text description, a definition list of one to four key metrics (value plus label), and a 'Read full case study' link. Use it for: the strongest customer success story in a document, a lighthouse reference with quantified results. Prefer 'Case Study Card' for a compact teaser and 'Case Study Grid' for browsing several stories.
